data.body:
Richard Latham and Bough
Barclaycard
1991-1997

Rowan Atkinson dumbed 007 down in his role as Richard Latham, a smarmy, bungling MI7 operative whose every case saw him outwitted by Barclaycard, while Henry Naylor played his sidekick, Bough. Atkinson would later reprise this role as Johnny English.
